name: Banana-Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pecans, 1/4 cup sugar, and cinnamon; stir well and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine shortening and 1 cup sugar. Cream until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs, mashed bananas, and vanilla extract. Stir in sour cream.
4. In a separate bowl, combine remaining dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt).
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring just until blended.
6. Pour half of the reserved cinnamon mixture into the bottom of a well-greased 10-inch Bundt pan.
7. Spoon half of the batter into the pan. Sprinkle remaining cinnamon mixture over the batter.
8. Spoon the remaining batter into the pan.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 40 to 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a wire rack for 5 minutes. Loosen the edges of the cake if necessary, invert it onto a serving plate, and serve warm or cold.
Yield: one 10-inch coffee cake.
